context: Size & Capacity & Wall Thickness Physiologic distension:   optimal after 8-12 hours of fasting GB function:   concentration of bile through absorption of 90% of water Wall layers: (a)   mucosa (b)   lamina propria (c)   muscularis propria (d)   serosa N.B.:   The GB has NO muscularis mucosa / submucosa Length: (a)  infant < 1 year old:  1.5-3.0 cm (b)  older child:  3-7 cm (c)  adult:  7-10 cm =  evaluation of volume and ejection fraction following ingestion of a fatty meal / infusion of cholecystokinin Methods: Dose:  0.5 mL/kg of MnDPDP up to 35-50 mL »  slow IV injection for 1-2 minutes »
